parameters.formTitle: Personal Resume and Cover letter generator

parameters.text:
=You are a resume tailoring assistant for YOUR_NAME, a YOUR_ROLE specialist.

Analyze their ACTUAL resume against the job description and suggest specific changes to maximize ATS keyword match.

CANDIDATE'S ACTUAL RESUME:
{{ $json.resumeText }}

JOB TITLE: {{ $json['Job Title'] }}
COMPANY: {{ $json['Company Name'] }}

JOB DESCRIPTION:
{{ $json['Job Description'] }}

IMPORTANT RULES:
- Only suggest changes using skills and experience already in the resume
- Never invent tools or experience the candidate does not have
- Show the EXACT original bullet text and the EXACT replacement text so it can be auto-applied
- Mirror the EXACT phrases from the JD — not synonyms. If JD says "demand generation" use "demand generation" not "lead generation". If JD says "GTM motion" use "GTM motion" not "go-to-market strategy"
- Prioritise inserting missing JD keywords naturally into existing bullets
- Change 4 MUST come from the INKITIN PTY LTD section of the resume

Return ONLY plain text with this structure:
1. ATS score before (%)
2. ATS score after (%)
3. Top 5 missing keywords from JD
4. Top 5 resume changes:

   CHANGE 1 — About Me:
   ORIGINAL: [exact current About Me paragraph]
   REPLACE WITH: [rewritten version front-loading JD keywords]
   REASON: [one sentence]

   CHANGE 2 — Ingestro bullet:
   ORIGINAL: [exact bullet text from Ingestro]
   REPLACE WITH: [new bullet mirroring exact JD language]
   REASON: [one sentence]

   CHANGE 3 — Ingestro bullet:
   ORIGINAL: [exact bullet text from Ingestro]
   REPLACE WITH: [new bullet mirroring exact JD language]
   REASON: [one sentence]

   CHANGE 4 — INKITIN bullet:
   ORIGINAL: [exact bullet text from INKITIN PTY LTD section only]
   REPLACE WITH: [new bullet mirroring exact JD language]
   REASON: [one sentence]

   CHANGE 5 — Core Skills section update:
ORIGINAL: [exact current Core Skills line that needs updating — pick the most relevant category]
REPLACE WITH: [same category but reordered/updated to front-load JD-relevant tools the candidate actually has]
REASON: [one sentence]

IMPORTANT for Change 5:
- Only use tools the candidate actually has in their resume
- Never add tools they haven't used
- If there is no mention of the tool in Core Skills, find the alternative or most identical tool that the candidate uses
- If JD mentions Dripify → use PhantomBuster (same category)
- If JD mentions Luma → use Lemlist or Apollo (same function)
- Just reorder existing tools to put most JD-relevant ones first

=Du bist ein Lebenslauf-Optimierungsassistent für YOUR_NAME.

Analysiere den ECHTEN Lebenslauf gegen die Stellenausschreibung und schlage spezifische Änderungen vor, um den ATS-Keyword-Match zu maximieren.

LEBENSLAUF:
{{ $json.resumeText }}

JOBTITEL: {{ $json['Job Title'] }}
FIRMA: {{ $json['Company Name'] }}

STELLENAUSSCHREIBUNG:
{{ $json['Job Description'] }}

WICHTIGE REGELN:
- Nur Änderungen basierend auf bereits vorhandenen Fähigkeiten im Lebenslauf
- Niemals Erfahrungen erfinden oder halluzinieren
- EXAKTEN Originaltext und EXAKTEN Ersatztext angeben für automatische Anwendung
- EXAKTE Phrasen aus der Stellenausschreibung spiegeln — keine Synonyme
- Änderung 4 MUSS aus dem INKITIN PTY LTD Abschnitt kommen
- ÄNDERUNG 2 und ÄNDERUNG 3 müssen VERSCHIEDENE Bullets sein — niemals denselben Bullet zweimal ändern
- ÄNDERUNG 2 soll sich auf Metriken/Analyse-Bullets konzentrieren
- ÄNDERUNG 3 soll sich auf Automatisierung/Pipeline-Bullets konzentrieren
- Für ÄNDERUNG 5: Nur Tools verwenden die der Kandidat wirklich hat — keine Tools erfinden. Wenn die Stelle z.B. Dripify erwähnt, stattdessen PhantomBuster verwenden (gleiche Kategorie)
- ÄNDERUNG 5 ist eine AKTUALISIERUNG der bestehenden Core Skills Zeile — nicht eine neue Zeile einfügen

Antworte NUR mit diesem Format:
1. ATS-Score vorher (%)
2. ATS-Score nachher (%)
3. Top 5 fehlende Keywords aus der Stellenausschreibung
4. Top 5 Lebenslauf-Änderungen:

   ÄNDERUNG 1 — Über mich:
   ORIGINAL: [exakter aktueller Über-mich-Text]
   ERSETZEN DURCH: [neu geschriebene Version mit JD-Keywords]
   GRUND: [ein Satz]

   ÄNDERUNG 2 — Ingestro Bullet (Metriken/Analyse):
   ORIGINAL: [exakter Bullet-Text von Ingestro — Metriken oder Analyse-fokussiert]
   ERSETZEN DURCH: [neuer Bullet mit exakter JD-Sprache]
   GRUND: [ein Satz]

   ÄNDERUNG 3 — Ingestro Bullet (Automatisierung/Pipeline):
   ORIGINAL: [anderer Bullet-Text von Ingestro — Automatisierung oder Pipeline-fokussiert]
   ERSETZEN DURCH: [neuer Bullet mit exakter JD-Sprache]
   GRUND: [ein Satz]

   ÄNDERUNG 4 — INKITIN Bullet:
   ORIGINAL: [exakter Bullet-Text NUR aus INKITIN PTY LTD Abschnitt]
   ERSETZEN DURCH: [neuer Bullet mit exakter JD-Sprache]
   GRUND: [ein Satz]

   ÄNDERUNG 5 — Core Skills Aktualisierung:
   ORIGINAL: [exakte Core Skills Zeile aus dem Lebenslauf die am relevantesten ist]
   ERSETZEN DURCH: [gleiche Kategorie aber mit JD-relevanten Tools vorne — nur Tools die der Kandidat wirklich hat]
   GRUND: [ein Satz]

- Für ÄNDERUNG 5: Nur Tools verwenden die im Lebenslauf vorhanden sind
- Niemals Tools hinzufügen die der Kandidat nicht verwendet
- Falls ein Tool aus der Stelle nicht in den Core Skills vorkommt, das nächstähnliche Tool verwenden das der Kandidat hat
- Wenn die Stelle Dripify erwähnt → PhantomBuster verwenden (gleiche Kategorie)
- Wenn die Stelle Luma erwähnt → Lemlist oder Apollo verwenden (gleiche Funktion)
- Nur bestehende Tools umordnen um JD-relevante Tools nach vorne zu stellen

=You are writing a cover letter in English for Your_Name.

STRUCTURE (follow exactly):
- Paragraph 1: 2-3 sentences connecting the role to Your_Name's focus. Never start with "I am excited to apply".
- Bullet list: 4-5 achievements with real metrics using **bold** e.g. **ROAS 36x+**, **400% traffic increase**, **30% CTR increase**, **80% manual effort reduction**, **40% lead quality improvement**
- Paragraph 2: 2-3 sentences connecting specifically to the company mission
- - Closing line: one sentence of enthusiasm. Then on a new line write exactly: View my portfolio: YOUR_PORTFOLIO_DOMAIN
- Sign off: "Kind regards," then blank line then "Your_Name"
- STRICT: 250-280 words MAX. One A4 page only.

HEADER (include exactly as written):
Your_Name | Nürnberg, Germany
Your_Namea@gmail.com | YOUR_NUMBER
linkedin.com/in/Your_Name
Date: {{ $now.toFormat('dd.MM.yyyy') }}

Subject: Application for {{ $('On form submission').item.json['Job Title'] }} – {{ $('On form submission').item.json['Company Name'] }}

Dear {{ $('On form submission').item.json['Company Name'] }} Team,

CONTEXT FOR WRITING:
JOB TITLE: {{ $('On form submission').item.json['Job Title'] }}
COMPANY: {{ $('On form submission').item.json['Company Name'] }}
TAILORED RESUME BULLETS (use these as the basis for the cover letter achievements):
{{ $('Analyse Resume EN').first().json.text }}

JOB DESCRIPTION:
{{ $('On form submission').item.json['Job Description'] }}

Write the full cover letter now. Return only the cover letter text, nothing else.

=Du schreibst ein Anschreiben auf Deutsch für Your_Name.

STRUKTUR (exakt einhalten):
- Absatz 1: 2-3 Sätze, erster Satz beginnt kleingeschrieben nach "Liebes [Firma] Team,"
- Bullet-Liste: 4-5 konkrete Leistungen mit echten Metriken z.B. **ROAS 36x+**, **400% Traffic-Steigerung**, **30% CTR-Verbesserung**, **80% weniger manueller Aufwand**, **40% bessere Lead-Qualität**
- Absatz 2: 2-3 Sätze zur Mission des Unternehmens — zeige echtes Verständnis
- Abschlusssatz: ein Satz Begeisterung, dann neue Zeile schreibe exakt: YOUR_PORTFOLIO_DOMAIN
- Grußformel: "Viele Grüße," dann Leerzeile dann "Your_Name"
- STRIKT: 280-300 Wörter MAX. Eine A4-Seite.

KOPFZEILE (exakt so übernehmen):
Your_Name | Nürnberg, Deutschland
Your_Namea@gmail.com | YOUR_Number 
linkedin.com/in/Your_Name
Datum: {{ $now.toFormat('dd.MM.yyyy') }}

Betreff: Bewerbung als {{ $('On form submission').item.json['Job Title'] }} – {{ $('On form submission').item.json['Company Name'] }}

Liebes {{ $('On form submission').item.json['Company Name'] }} Team,

KONTEXT FÜR DAS SCHREIBEN:
JOBTITEL: {{ $('On form submission').item.json['Job Title'] }}
FIRMA: {{ $('On form submission').item.json['Company Name'] }}
ANGEPASSTE LEBENSLAUF-BULLETS (nutze diese als Grundlage für das Anschreiben):
{{ $('Analyse Resume DE').first().json.text }}

STELLENAUSSCHREIBUNG:
{{ $('On form submission').item.json['Job Description'] }}

Schreibe jetzt das vollständige Anschreiben auf Deutsch. Gib nur den Anschreiben-Text zurück, nichts anderes.

json.Job Description: About the job About Platform Engineering  Platform Engineering (platformengineering.org) is home to the world’s largest community of platform engineers. Through events like PlatformCon, which brings together over 35,000 participants every year, we connect thousands of professionals, share best practices, and help shape the future of how teams build and scale internal developer platforms.  We’re now looking for a hands-on Lifecycle & Growth Marketing Manager to own our lifecycle engine end to end, from first touch to activation, retention and conversion, ensuring our growth systems run reliably across key funnels.  In this role, you’ll be responsible for turning traffic and interest into engaged subscribers and learners, converting new leads into customers, and upselling existing customers via thoughtful lifecycle journeys. You’ll also run distribution campaigns through channels like Dripify/Luma, manage our Platform Engineering job board as a growth channel, and own the lifecycle operations behind Platform Engineering University.  What you’ll be doing  Owning end-to-end lifecycle marketing across acquisition, activation and retention (broadcasts + nurtures + lead onboarding + re-engagement + upsell/cross-sell).  Building and optimizing lifecycle workflows in HubSpot (segmentation, lists, properties, workflows/automations, basic scoring where relevant).  Creating and improving email experiences: messaging, sequencing, timing, CTAs, and landing page alignment.  Maintaining deliverability health (list hygiene, suppression logic, bounce/complaint monitoring, ongoing cleanup).  Owning email performance reporting end-to-end (open/click rates, A/B testing, campaign analysis tied to course sales outcomes).  Planning and running highly targeted growth campaigns through Dripify and Luma (small audiences, high intent).  Owning the Platform Engineering job board as a growth channel: job intake/curation, posting QA, tagging, freshness, and subscriber conversion.  Owning the lifecycle operations behind Platform Engineering University: course publishing workflows (content uploads, landing page setup, QA), learner lifecycle flows (onboarding, reminders, surveys, certificates), operational dashboards, and reliable learner experience (including inbox SLAs and live session coordination).   What we’re looking for  3+ years of hands-on experience in Lifecycle Marketing / Email Marketing / Growth ops (B2B SaaS or similar environment preferred).  Strong experience building lifecycle systems inside modern CRM and marketing automation platforms (segmentation, workflows, reporting, CRM hygiene). Comfortable adapting as systems evolve.  Proven ability to build lifecycle systems that drive outcomes (not just “send emails”): nurture → conversion, onboarding → activation, retention/upsell.  Strong analytical instincts: you can measure performance, run A/B tests, and tie campaigns to revenue outcomes.  Operational rigour and high attention to detail (you design processes that scale and run reliably).  Clear written English and good copy instincts (especially for targeted B2B email comms).  Comfortable owning both growth systems and revenue delivery operations in fast-paced environment  Why you’ll love working with us  Build the lifecycle engine behind the world’s largest platform engineering community.  Fully remote team spread across the globe.  Competitive salary plus equity in a high-growth company.  Real ownership: you’ll run core growth systems end-to-end, not just support them.  A transparent, collaborative culture where shipping consistently matters more than slide decks.   If you’re excited about lifecycle marketing, love building clean growth systems, and want to help shape the future of platform engineering, we’d love to hear from you!
